content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: webhook_verify
C: timestamp_check ∧ abs_diff ∧ threshold_compare
P: current_time ∧ webhook_timestamp ∧ time_skew_tolerance
V: "300" ∧ "401" ∧ provider_drift ∧ edge_case
A: tolerance_buffer ∧ skew_allowance ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: webhook_verify.
Constraints: timestamp_check and abs_diff and threshold_compare.
Plan: current_time and webhook_timestamp and time_skew_tolerance.
Verify: "300" and "401" and provider_drift and edge_case.
Answer target: tolerance_buffer and skew_allowance and min_fix and reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid

Verify: charge_loop and grace_period and exact_encode and min_duration.
Answer target: boundary_fix and reg_test and encode_grace and loop_break.

@sigil v0 hybrid

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal
C: user_input ∧ baseDir ∧ req.query.file
P: "download" ∧ path_construction ∧ no_validation
V: sanitize_input ∧ whitelist_files ∧ resolve_path

Constraints: user_input and baseDir and req.query.file.

Verify: sanitize_input and whitelist_files and resolve_path.
Answer target: input_validation and safe_join and boundary_check.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: sql_injection_risk

C: user_input ∧ direct_concatenation ∧ no_sanitization

P: malicious_query ∧ data_exposure ∧ system_compromise

V: parameterized_queries ∧ input_validation ∧ whitelist_columns

A: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ ORDER_BY ∧ req.query

[AUDIT]
Goal: sql_injection_risk.
Constraints: user_input and direct_concatenation and no_sanitization.
Plan: malicious_query and data_exposure and system_compromise.
Verify: parameterized_queries and input_validation and whitelist_columns.
Answer target: "SELECT" and "sort" and ORDER_BY and req.query.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcileBatch

P: "await" ∧ apply_rules ∧ db_save

Plan: "await" and apply_rules and db_save.
Verify: emit_metrics and minimal_change.
Answer target: async/await and "next(err)" and db_err.
